variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17435 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17435 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17435 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 265.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 259.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 252.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 285.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 270.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 22.5 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P788896 Air Filter, Primary Obround Powercore | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17435
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P788896 Air Filter, Primary Obround Powercore | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17435
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P788896 Air Filter, Primary Obround Powercore is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, primary obround powercore applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4248 air filter meets or exceeds the customers’ technical specifications for air filtration systems including factors such as: media fiber size, shape, pore size, thickness, weave and mechanical strength.
